rephrased_requirement: Design and implement a file upload and question answering system that provides accurate responses to user queries, with a response time of less than 5 seconds, an accuracy rate of at least 90%, and adherence to industry-standard security protocols.
functional_requirements: Users can upload files in PDF, DOCX, and TXT formats
Users can input natural language questions related to the uploaded file content
The system provides relevant answers to user queries based on the uploaded file content
The system supports file uploads up to 10MB in size
The system can handle a minimum of 100 concurrent user sessions
non_functional_requirements: The system responds to user queries within 5 seconds
The system achieves an accuracy rate of at least 90% for correct answers
The system is available 99.9% of the time, with a maximum of 1 hour of scheduled maintenance per week
The system can scale to handle a 20% increase in user traffic within 1 hour
security_requirements: The system encrypts all uploaded files and user data using AES-256
The system authenticates users using OAuth 2.0 with a minimum of 2-factor authentication
The system validates all user input to prevent SQL injection and cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks
The system implements a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and prevent common web attacks
acceptance_criteria: The system correctly answers at least 90% of test questions related to uploaded file content
The system responds to user queries within 5 seconds for at least 99% of test cases
The system successfully uploads and processes files of varying sizes and formats
The system prevents common web attacks and validates user input correctly
recommended_solution_approach: A cloud-based microservices architecture using containerization (e.g., Docker) and orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), with a natural language processing (NLP) engine (e.g., spaCy or Stanford CoreNLP) and a machine learning model (e.g., scikit-learn or TensorFlow) for answer generation
open_questions: What is the expected volume of user traffic and file uploads per hour?
What is the desired user interface for the system (e.g., web, mobile, or desktop application)?
What are the specific industries or domains that the system will cater to (e.g., medical, financial, or educational)?
What is the budget for the project, and what are the key performance indicators (KPIs) for success?
